unitName: 我的寵物倉鼠哈羅德 | My pet hamster Harold

article.title: My pet hamster Harold 我的寵物倉鼠哈羅德

paragraphs.english: Hi everybody! This is a picture of my pet hamster. His name is Harold and he lives in this blue cage.
sentences: Hi everybody!
This is a picture of my pet hamster.
His name is Harold and he lives in this blue cage.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 嗨，大家好！這是我寵物倉鼠的照片。他的名字叫哈羅德，他住在這個藍色的籠子裡。
translation_sentences: 🌐 嗨，大家好！
這是我寵物倉鼠的照片。
他的名字叫哈羅德，他住在這個藍色的籠子裡。

implication.english: 💡 The speaker introduces his pet hamster Harold and his cage, using 'this' to point to the picture and cage.
implication.chinese: 💡 講者介紹他的寵物倉鼠哈羅德和籠子，用「這個」指向照片和籠子。[換句話說]：大家好，這是我的倉鼠哈羅德，牠住在這個藍色籠子裡。

paragraphs.english: Do you see these red balls right here? These are Harold's favourite toys. And do you see that wheel in the back? Harold uses that for exercise.
sentences: Do you see these red balls right here?
These are Harold's favourite toys.
And do you see that wheel in the back?
Harold uses that for exercise.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 你看到這邊這些紅色的球嗎？這些是哈羅德最喜歡的玩具。你看到後面的那個輪子嗎？哈羅德用那個來運動。
translation_sentences: 🌐 你看到這邊這些紅色的球嗎？
這些是哈羅德最喜歡的玩具。
你看到後面的那個輪子嗎？
哈羅德用那個來運動。

implication.english: 💡 The speaker points out Harold's toys and exercise wheel, using 'these' for nearby items and 'that' for the wheel further away.
implication.chinese: 💡 講者指出哈羅德的玩具和運動輪，用「這些」指近處的物品，用「那個」指較遠的輪子。[換句話說]：這紅球是牠的玩具，後面那個輪子是牠的運動器材。

paragraphs.english: Last week, Harold escaped from his cage. That was a terrible day! We looked for Harold everywhere, but we couldn't find him for hours! Those were very scary hours! I thought we might never see Harold again. Luckily, we found him! Do you know where he was? He was under my bed. That was his hiding spot.
sentences: Last week, Harold escaped from his cage.
That was a terrible day!
We looked for Harold everywhere, but we couldn't find him for hours!
Those were very scary hours!
I thought we might never see Harold again.
Luckily, we found him!
Do you know where he was?
He was under my bed.
That was his hiding spot.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 上星期，哈羅德從籠子裡逃走了。那天真是糟透了！我們到處找哈羅德，但好幾個小時都找不到他！那幾個小時非常可怕！我以為我們可能再也見不到哈羅德了。幸運的是，我們找到他了！你知道他在哪裡嗎？他在我的床底下。那是他的藏身處。
translation_sentences: 🌐 上星期，哈羅德從籠子裡逃走了。
那天真是糟透了！
我們到處找哈羅德，但好幾個小時都找不到他！
那幾個小時非常可怕！
我以為我們可能再也見不到哈羅德了。
幸運的是，我們找到他了！
你知道他在哪裡嗎？
他在我的床底下。
那是他的藏身處。

implication.english: 💡 The speaker narrates the scary escape incident, using 'that' for the specific day and 'those' for the hours, highlighting the relief of finding Harold.
implication.chinese: 💡 講者敘述了可怕的逃脫事件，用「那個」指特定的一天，「那些」指那幾個小時，強調找到哈羅德的欣慰。[換句話說]：上星期哈羅德跑掉了，我們找了好久都找不到，超可怕的，幸好最後在床底下找到牠。

paragraphs.english: I don't want Harold to escape from his cage again. I always make sure the cage is locked these days, but it seems Harold is looking for ways to unlock it.
sentences: I don't want Harold to escape from his cage again.
I always make sure the cage is locked these days, but it seems Harold is looking for ways to unlock it.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我不想哈羅德再從籠子裡逃走。最近我總是確保籠子是鎖著的，但哈羅德似乎一直在想辦法打開它。
translation_sentences: 🌐 我不想哈羅德再從籠子裡逃走。
最近我總是確保籠子是鎖著的，但哈羅德似乎一直在想辦法打開它。

implication.english: 💡 The speaker takes precautions but Harold is still trying to escape, showing his naughty nature.
implication.chinese: 💡 講者採取預防措施，但哈羅德仍在嘗試逃跑，顯示牠頑皮的天性。[換句話說]：我現在都把籠子鎖好，但牠好像一直在研究怎麼開鎖。

paragraphs.english: Before I got Harold, I had two other hamsters named Wally and Wilma. Those hamsters were a lot less naughty. They never tried to get out of their cage! I want to teach Harold to behave well. If you have any suggestions for me, let me know!
sentences: Before I got Harold, I had two other hamsters named Wally and Wilma.
Those hamsters were a lot less naughty.
They never tried to get out of their cage!
I want to teach Harold to behave well.
If you have any suggestions for me, let me know!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 在養哈羅德之前，我有兩隻倉鼠，名叫沃利和威爾瑪。那兩隻倉鼠乖多了。牠們從來沒想過要逃出籠子！我想教哈羅德乖乖聽話。如果你有什麼建議，請告訴我！
translation_sentences: 🌐 在養哈羅德之前，我有兩隻倉鼠，名叫沃利和威爾瑪。
那兩隻倉鼠乖多了。
牠們從來沒想過要逃出籠子！
我想教哈羅德乖乖聽話。
如果你有什麼建議，請告訴我！

implication.english: 💡 The speaker compares Harold to previous hamsters, highlighting Harold's naughtiness and asking for advice.
implication.chinese: 💡 講者將哈羅德與之前的倉鼠比較，突顯哈羅德的頑皮，並徵求建議。[換句話說]：我以前養的兩隻倉鼠很乖，從來不逃跑，哈羅德真的太皮了，誰能教教我怎麼管牠？
